description: FlexSim MCP 集成控制系统 - 通过 MCP 协议远程控制 FlexSim 仿真软件，实现建模仿真功能

userStories.title: 创建 FlexScript 执行器模板模型
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pre-built FlexSim .fsm model that can receive FlexScript strings from Python, execute them, and return results, so that the MCP server can run arbitrary FlexScript code.
acceptanceCriteria: 在项目根目录生成 executor.fsm 预置模型文件
executor.fsm 内含 OnMessage 触发器，接收消息后执行 FlexScript 并回传
executor.fsm 可通过 controller.open('executor.fsm') 加载，不弹出阻塞对话框
提供配置文档说明制作过程
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 实现 send/receive FlexScript 执行通道
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to implement execute_script() using send/receive mechanism, so that the MCP server can execute FlexScript code beyond simple node path evaluation.
acceptanceCriteria: 在 flexsim_client.py 中新增 execute_script(script: str) -> str 方法
execute_script() 内部：controller.send(script) → controller.receive() 读取结果
超时抛出 FlexSimError
execute_script('return time();') 返回非 None 字符串
execute_script("createinstance(library().find('Source'), model()); return 'ok';") 返回 'ok'
smoke_eval.py 脚本覆盖上述工具的正常路径测试，并全部通过
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: flexsim_new_model 创建干净空模型
userStories.description: As an MCP client, I need flexsim_new_model to reliably create a clean empty model without dialogs, so that I can start fresh simulations programmatically.
acceptanceCriteria: new_model() 调用后 model().subnodes.length 等于最小状态
不弹出任何阻塞性 GUI 对话框
如果已加载 executor.fsm，需重新加载以维持执行通道
返回成功确认消息，包含当前模型对象数量
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: simple_production_line 模板构建端到端验证
userStories.description: As an MCP client, I need to build and run a simple_production_line template end-to-end without manual intervention, so that I can verify the Phase 2 toolchain works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: flexsim_build_from_template(template_name='simple_production_line') 调用成功
flexsim_validate_model() 返回空问题列表
flexsim_reset() + flexsim_run_to_time(time=3600) 可成功运行
flexsim_get_performance_measure(name='Output') 返回大于 0 的数值
整个流程无需人工 GUI 操作
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 错误信息与兼容性完善
userStories.description: As an MCP client, I need clear error messages from tools, so that I can debug failures without ambiguity.
acceptanceCriteria: flexsim_add_object 对 type/object_type/objectType、x/y/z 字符串数字兼容已存在
所有 Phase 2 工具在 FlexScript 执行失败时返回包含 error 字段的 JSON
flexsim_get_model_tree 支持 detail_level 参数（'basic' 返回名称列表，'full' 返回含类型和坐标的 JSON）
smoke_eval.py 脚本覆盖上述工具的正常路径测试
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: ModelSpec JSON Schema 校验
userStories.description: As a developer, I need model_spec.py to validate ModelSpec JSON structure before sending to FlexSim, so that I can catch schema errors early.
acceptanceCriteria: validate_model_spec() 校验：objects 非空、type 在白名单内、name/x/y/z 必填
connections 引用的名称存在、至少含一个 Source 和一个 Sink
类型白名单：Source, Queue, Processor, Sink, Combiner, Separator, MultiProcessor
validate_model_spec() 返回 list[str]，每条为人类可读错误描述
对缺少 Sink 的 ModelSpec 返回含 'Sink' 关键字的错误条目
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: flexsim_build_from_spec MCP 工具
userStories.description: As an AI client, I need to pass a complete ModelSpec JSON to build a custom simulation model in one call, so that I can create complex models programmatically.
acceptanceCriteria: 实现 flexsim_build_from_spec(spec: dict) -> str 工具
在 server.py 中注册为 MCP 可调用工具
内部调用 validate_model_spec() → ModelSpecTranslator.translate() → builder 调用
传入超市收银台 ModelSpec（含 3 个 Processor 并联）可成功构建并验证
校验失败时返回 {"error": "...", "issues": [...]}
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: flexsim_describe_to_model 自然语言建模工具
userStories.description: As a user, I want to describe a simulation scenario in natural language and have the MCP tool automatically generate and build the model, so that I can create simulations without technical knowledge.
acceptanceCriteria: 实现 flexsim_describe_to_model(description: str) -> str 工具
工具内部将 description 结合 System Prompt 发送给 LLM 获取 ModelSpec JSON
获取到 ModelSpec 后自动调用 flexsim_build_from_spec 完成模型构建
返回消息包含：生成的 ModelSpec 摘要（对象数、连接数）+ 构建结果
对
的输入，能生成含 Source-Queue-4×Processor-Sink 拓扑
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 仿真结果 AI 摘要工具
userStories.description: As a user, I want to get natural language simulation result summaries instead of raw numbers, so that I can quickly understand simulation outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: 实现 flexsim_summarize_results(metrics: list[str] | None = None) -> str 工具
自动调用 getPerformanceMeasure 收集 KPI
生成人类可读的仿真结果摘要
摘要包含：仿真时长、吞吐量、平均等待时间、关键瓶颈提示
Typecheck passes
